description: Core engine and game logic - the foundation layer including rendering, input, audio, card entities, deck, tableau, foundation, stock/waste piles, drag-and-drop, and the game state machine. This produces a playable solitaire game with canvas rendering.
steps: Create index.html with HTML5 boilerplate, canvas element, meta viewport for responsiveness, favicon (inline SVG data URI of a spade), and ES module script loading

Create styles.css with CSS custom properties design system, green felt background, full viewport canvas, safe-area insets, dvh units, responsive breakpoints for phone/tablet/desktop in portrait and landscape
Create src/core/loop.js - requestAnimationFrame game loop with dt clamped to <=0.05s, pause/resume support, update and render callbacks
Create src/core/input.js - unified pointer events (mouse + touch), keyboard input, drag state tracking with start/move/end handlers
Create src/core/math.js - vector2 operations, lerp, clamp, easing functions (easeOutQuad, easeOutBounce, easeInOutCubic), random helpers
Create src/core/render.js - Canvas2D renderer with resize handling (devicePixelRatio-aware), clear, draw primitives, text rendering, coordinate transforms

Create src/core/audio.js - Web Audio API synthesizer with gesture-gated AudioContext initialization. Synthesize sounds: cardFlip (short white noise burst), cardPlace (low thud), cardShuffle (multiple rapid flips), win (ascending arpeggio), buttonClick (short blip), undo (descending blip), error (buzz). All programmatic - no audio files.

Create src/game/card.js - Card class with suit, rank, faceUp state, x/y position, target position, width/height, animation state. Include programmatic card face rendering: draw suit symbols (spade/heart/diamond/club as path data), rank text, card borders with rounded corners, red/black coloring, card back pattern rendering
Create src/game/deck.js - generate full 52-card deck, Fisher-Yates shuffle, seeded random for daily challenges

Create src/game/tableau.js - 7 tableau column logic: deal cards (1-7 per column, top face up), validate moves (alternating colors, descending rank), accept cards, reveal top card on remove, empty columns accept Kings only
Create src/game/foundation.js - 4 foundation pile logic: accept Ace to start, same suit ascending, validate placement, check win condition (all 52 cards in foundations)
Create src/game/stock.js - stock/waste pile logic: draw-1 and draw-3 modes, cycle through stock, track waste cards, recycle waste back to stock when empty

Create src/game/drag.js - drag-and-drop system: hit testing cards, pick up single card or valid sequence from tableau, visual feedback during drag (cards follow pointer with offset), snap-to-target on valid drop, animate back on invalid drop, touch and mouse unified via pointer events

Create src/game/game.js - game orchestrator: state machine (menu/playing/paused/won/lost), deal new game, update all entities, render all piles and cards, handle move validation, scoring integration, undo support (single undo with state snapshot), auto-complete detection (when all remaining cards are face-up and can be moved to foundations), win animation trigger, timer for Hard mode
acceptance_criteria: index.html loads without errors and shows a green felt canvas
Cards are rendered programmatically on canvas with correct suits, ranks, colors, and card backs
A new game deals correctly: 7 tableau columns with 1-7 cards, top cards face up
Drag and drop works for moving cards between tableau columns and to foundations
Move validation enforces solitaire rules (alternating colors descending on tableau, same suit ascending on foundations)
Stock/waste pile works with both draw-1 and draw-3 modes
Win condition detected when all 52 cards are in foundations
Audio synthesizes and plays on user interaction
Game loop runs at smooth 60fps with clamped dt
verification: node tests/selftest.mjs passes all core logic tests (deck generation, shuffle, move validation, win detection)
Open index.html - game loads, cards render, drag-and-drop functional
